form.formComment: Gelding by Raise The Flag facing the starter for the first time. Trialled on March 11 at Hamilton over 2800m and failed to finish. Unplaced in recent trials and looks tested.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Gelding by Raise The Flag facing the starter for the first time. Trialled on March 11 at Hamilton over 2800m and failed to finish. Unplaced in recent trials and looks tested.

form.formComment: At the latest run 5th of 10 at Avoca Mdn-Sw on March 29 over 1860m, 1.1 len behind Future Frankie with 59.5kg at $41. Before that 10th of 13 at Warrnambool Mdn-Sw on March 9 over 2350m, 16 len behind Phoenician carrying 56.5kg at $151. Yet to show much and would need to improve sharply.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced with without cover from the 1600m. Near the 500m, shifted in.
Bumped at the start. Shortly after shifted in.

form.formComment: At debut, 2nd of 8 at this track Mdn-Sw on March 17 over 1856m, slow going neck behind Which Floor with 69.5kg at $13. Bit tougher here.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(12.5). At debut, 2nd of 8 at this track Mdn-Sw on March 17 over 1856m, slow going neck behind Which Floor with 69.5kg at $13. Bit tougher here.

form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Most recently tracked the speed and boxed on steadily 2nd of 9 at Ararat Mdn-Sw on March 30 over 1606m, 1.3 len behind Hurco with 59kg at $2.25. The race before that 3rd of 10 at Colac Mdn-Sw on March 1 over 1600m, slow going 1.75 len behind The King And I with 59kg at $4.60. Knocking on the door and can give a sight.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced keenly in the early and middle stages.
Near the 1100m shifted in. Laid out rounding the home turn.
Over-raced in the early stages. Near the 900m, shifted out when over-racing.

form.formComment: Gelding by Toronado making his first appearance. Ran 3rd in a jump-out at Camperdown on March 30. Market best guide.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Gelding by Toronado making his first appearance. Ran 3rd in a jump-out at Camperdown on March 30. Market best guide.

form.formComment: Three-year-old gelding (Fierce Impact - Dane Hussler). He has seven recent trials leading in today's debut. Runner-up in a Caulfield Heath trial over 1500m on March 26. Drawn well and must respect for top yard.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Three-year-old gelding (Fierce Impact - Dane Hussler). He has seven recent trials leading in today's debut. Runner-up in a Caulfield Heath trial over 1500m on March 26. Drawn well and must respect for top yard.

form.formComment: Is first-up after a break of eight months and has been in the money when fresh before. Finished off last preparation seventh of 18 at Chukyo 3yo Mdn Wfa August 16 over 2200m, 5.5 len behind Terpsichora with 55.0kg at $9.40. When resuming last campaign third of 16 at Kyoto October 12 2024 over 1600m, 1.1 len behind Dragon Boost with 55.0kg at $13.90. The Japanese ratings say she's right up to this.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after three months 5th of 9 at Warrnambool Mdn-Sw on March 26 over 1400m, slow going 4.5 len behind She's A Jett with 57.5kg at $5. Previously second-up 5th of 9 at Warrnambool Mdn-Sw on October 16 over 2000m, on a slow track; 6 len behind Riozino carrying 57.5kg at $21. Possible improver.

form.formComment: Was at big odds at debut, 9th of 11 at Kilmore Mdn-Sw on March 31 over 1607m, on a slow track; 13 len behind Dealer Sing with 57kg at $41. Don't think she will trouble this field.

form.formComment: Raced two times to date. At debut, second last of 10 at Kilmore 3yo F Mdn-Sw on March 6 over 1450m, slow going 9 len behind She's Stargazing with 57kg at $21. Last start came home strongly from last on the turn; 4th of 9 at Bairnsdale Mdn-Sw on March 22 over 1600m, on a slow track; 9 len behind Wentworth Falls carrying 57kg at $15. Hasn't shown enough.

form.formComment: Jumped at long odds at debut, 6th of 10 at Kilmore 3yo Mdn-Sw on March 31 over 1457m, slow going 6 len behind Regal Visions with 56kg at $26. Needs to show a lot more.

form.formComment: Third race start. First start eased back early on 6th of 8 at Ballarat Synthetic 3yo Mdn-Sw on August 4 over 1100m, 11 len behind Olatunde carrying 58kg at $26. Returned from break ran last of 12 at this track Mdn-Sw on March 17 over 1406m, slow going 13 len behind Regal Ascend carrying 59kg at $15. Not keen.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after seven months 7th of 13 at Sale Mdn-Sw on March 29 over 1717m, slow going 10 len behind Perfect Night carrying 59kg at $71. Previously second-up eased back early on 6th of 9 at Pakenham Synthetic Mdn-Sw on August 25 over 1600m, 8 len behind Zambardo carrying 57kg at $26. Hard to get excited about his chances.
